title: Level Segment Standard Configuration
description: Standard configuration template for level segments

initial_state.description: Initial game state for the segment

available_blocks.description: List of block types available in this segment

execution_rules.description: Rules that govern execution in this segment

validation_criteria.description: Criteria for validating a correct solution

success.description: Message shown when segment is completed successfully

hints.description: Array of hints to help the student

syntax_highlighting.description: Enable syntax highlighting in the code editor

line_numbers.description: Show line numbers in the code editor

show_state.description: Show current game state during execution
